textPlain: For English translation about incidents, Google Translate for entire website might be helpful: https://smc-peering-tw.translate.goog/?_x_tr_sl=auto&_x_tr_t...
Can someone explain?  (Are all the reds failures?  Is it all physical damage to cables, or some other cause?)
The title is a bit misleading. We have internet here. We also have several cables currently damaged.

The alerts icon (triangle with a ! in it) shows a text list of the outages. There are many active; only one happened recently. They seem spaced out from each other, not indicative of a burst of Chinese naval activity.
Sorry, should have said "Current Cable Outage" instead.

It is not a burst but a consistent sabotage action happening in the background [1]. To make the matter worse, those vessels that commit the crime will be merchant ship flying flags of convenience. [2][1] https://globaltaiwan.org/2025/03/countering-chinas-subsea-ca.... 
[2] https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy3zy9jvd4o
